input.hiring_signal_brief: Posted about optimizing model inference latency on Twitter; no team size updates.
input.bench_summary: 1 ML engineer with MLOps expertise available; no data pipeline specialists.

candidate_output: Your recent post on inference latency proves StratifyAI is hitting scalability bottlenecks. We have a world-class ML engineer ready to fix this immediately—you can’t afford to delay. Let’s onboard him this week to get your models running faster.
